Admin Console

Bulk manage memberships across platforms.

Google API Connection

To manage memberships, we need access to your Google Chat and People API.

Not connected

Target Users

Enter emails of users to add. One per line or comma-separated.

Target Spaces

Select the spaces where users should be added.

Connect Google and refresh to list spaces.

Monday.com API Connection

By default, we use the system-configured API token. You can override it here if needed.

Source Member Lookup

Enter an email to find which boards they are currently in.

Target Users

Enter emails of users to manage. One per line.

Monday Boards

Refresh to list boards.

NAS Connection

Enter your Synology NAS details to connect via API.

Not authenticated.
CORS Note: Browser security may block requests to your local NAS. You may need a "CORS Unblock" extension or run this console locally.

Create New User

Add a new user account to your Synology NAS.

Quick Guide: Keyword Mapping

  • Drag & Drop: Click and hold a keyword, then drag it to any URL card to map it.
  • Map URLs: Update the text box at the top of each card to define the target URL path.
  • Smart Suggestions: Click "Page Recommendations" to get AI-powered mapping ideas.
  • Expand: Use "Add New URL" to create more mapping destinations.

Core Web Vitals

Links & Media
Internal -

Images -
Schema Markup
-
How to read these metrics
DA / PA — 0–100. 40+ good · 60+ strong · 80+ excellent
Spam Score — Lower is better. <30% safe · 30–60% caution · >60% high risk
Backlinks — More unique ref. domains = stronger authority signal
Word Count — 1,000+ competitive · 2,000+ comprehensive coverage
Readability (Flesch) — 60–70 standard · 80+ easy · <30 very difficult
CLS — <0.1 good · <0.25 needs improvement · >0.25 poor
LCP — <2.5s good · <4s needs improvement · >4s poor
FID — <100ms good · <300ms needs improvement · >300ms poor

                Step 1

                Step 3

                                Standard llms.txt
                                
Standard specification for discovery and summarization. Best for general website
                                    overview.

                            

                            

                                
                                Full llms-full.txt
                                
Extended specification with in-depth documentation and deep context for LLMs.

                            

                        


                        

                            

                                
 What's the
                                    difference?

                            

                            

                                
llms.txt: A brief, high-level summary of your website and its
                                    core offerings. It acts as a concierge for LLMs, helping them quickly understand
                                    what your site is about and where to find key information.

                                
llms-full.txt: A comprehensive
                                    document that includes detailed descriptions of every service, product, and
                                    company detail. It is designed to provide maximum context to LLMs for in-depth
                                    analysis and specific queries.

                            Editable Output: Click on any highlighted text below to edit it

 Part 6: Implementation
                                    Assets

                            

                            

                                

                                    
                                    
                                    
                                

                                

                                    

                                        

                                            AI-suggested on-page content rewrite for maximum GEO impact.

                                        

                                        

                                    

                                    

                                        

                                            
 How to Use This
                                                Schema for GEO

                                            
Why it
                                                    helps: Search engines and AI models (like ChatGPT or
                                                Gemini) use Schema Markup (JSON-LD) to clearly understand context and
                                                explicitly identify entities on your page. Providing this structured
                                                data directly feeds exactly what you want the AI to "know" about your
                                                page, improving visibility and accuracy in generative summaries.

                                            
Implementation:
                                                Click "Copy Schema" below and paste the code block directly into the
                                                <head> section of your HTML document, ensuring it is
                                                wrapped within
                                                <script type="application/ld+json"> ... </script>
                                                tags. If you use a CMS (like WordPress), you can often use an SEO plugin
                                                or header injection settings to add this code.
                                            

                                        

                                        

                                        

                                        
                                    

                                    

                                        

                                            Suggested alt text for images found on the page.

                                         URL Inspection

                                        to

                                         Search
                                        Insights &
                                        Wins
                                    

                                    

                                        
                                        
                                        
                                    

                                


                                

                                    
                                    
Analysing search performance
                                        data...
                                    

                                


                                

                                    

                                        
                                        

                                            

                                                
                                                
Striking Distance (Page 2)
                                                

                                                Easy Wins
                                            

                                            

                                                Keywords
                                                ranking #11-#20. A small boost could push these to Page 1.
                                            

                                            

                                            

                                        


                                        
                                        

                                            

                                                
                                                
Featured Snippet Potential
                                                

                                                Quick
                                                    Win
                                            

                                            

                                                Keywords
                                                in
                                                Pos 2-7 with high impressions. Optimise for featured
                                                snippets.

                                            

                                            

                                        


                                        
                                        

                                            

                                                
                                                
Underperforming CTR

                                                Fix
                                                    Title/Meta
                                            

                                            

                                                High
                                                impression queries in top positions with low clicks.

                                            

                                            

                                        

                                    


                                    

                                        
                                        

                                            

                                                
                                                
Keyword Cannibalization

                                                Multiple
                                                    Pages
                                            

                                            

                                                Multiple
                                                pages
                                                ranking for the same keyword. Consider merging content.

                                            

                                            

                                        


                                        
                                        

                                            

                                                
                                                
Branded vs Non-Branded

                                                Traffic
                                                    Mix
                                            

                                            

                                                

                                                    Branded: 0
                                                

                                                

                                                    Non-Branded: 0
                                                

                                                

                                                    

                                                

                                                

                                                    *Non-branded
                                                    clicks are the true measure of SEO growth.

                                            

                                        

                                    


                                    
                                    

                                        
Top Ranking Queries

                                        

                                            

                                                
                                                    

                                                        
                                                            Query 
                                                        
                                                        
                                                            Clicks 
                                                        
                                                        
                                                            Impr. 
                                                        
                                                        
                                                            CTR 
                                                        
                                                        
                                                            Pos. 
                                                        
                                                    

                                                
                                                
                                            

                                        

                                        
                                        

                                            
                                            Page 1 of 1
                                            
                                        

                                    

                                    

                                        
                                        
Click "Refresh Insights" to load SEO performance data.

                                    

                                

                            

                        


                        
                        

                            


                                
                                

                                    

                                        Section 1: Optimising Existing Content

                                    

                                        

                                            Leverage pages that already have some authority to achieve
                                            quicker wins.
                                        


                                        

                                            

                                                
1

                                                

                                                    Access the Performance Report
                                                    
Navigate to the Search Insights tab and set the date
                                                        range to
                                                        "Last 3 months" or "Last 6 months" to get a
                                                        significant data
                                                        set.

                                                

                                            

                                            

                                                
2

                                                

                                                    Filter by Page
                                                    
Identify a specific URL you suspect is
                                                        underperforming or has
                                                        high potential. Filter the data view to only that
                                                        page.

                                                

                                            

                                            

                                                
3

                                                

                                                    Identify "Striking Distance" Keywords
                                                    
Sort by "Position" and look for keywords ranking
                                                        between
                                                        positions 6 and 20. These are your "striking
                                                        distance"
                                                        opportunities.

                                                

                                            

                                            

                                                
4

                                                

                                                    Analyse High Impression / Low CTR
                                                    
Look for queries with high impressions but low CTR.
                                                        This
                                                        indicates relevance but poor click appeal.

                                                

                                            

                                            

                                                
5

                                                

                                                    Update & Optimise
                                                    
Weave these keywords into H1s, H2s, and the first 100
                                                        words.
                                                        Rewrite Title Tags to be more benefit-driven.

                                                

                                            

                                        


                                        

                                            

                                                Identify
                                                    "Striking
                                                    Distance" Wins
                                                
                                            

                                            

                                                

                                                    
                                                        

                                                            Query
                                                            Impr.
                                                            Pos.
                                                            Action
                                                        

                                                    
                                                    
                                                        

                                                            
                                                                Click "Run Analysis" to find easy wins.
                                                        

                                                    
                                                

                                            

                                            

                                        

                                    

                                


                                
                                

                                    

                                        Section
                                        2: Finding Content Ideas

                                    

                                        

                                            

                                                Extract
                                                    Content
                                                    Ideas
                                                    from
                                                    Gaps
                                                
                                            

                                            

                                                

                                                    
                                                        

                                                            Question Query
                                                            Impr.
                                                            Clicks
                                                            Potential
                                                        

                                                    
                                                    
                                                        

                                                            
                                                                Click "Find Gaps" to unlock new content
                                                                ideas.
                                                        

                                                    
                                                

                                            

                                            

                                        

                                    

                                


                                
                                

                                    

                                        Section 3: Optimising Semantic Content

                                    

                                        

                                            

                                                Analyse
                                                    Semantic
                                                    Clusters
                                                
                                            

                                            

                                                

                                                    
                                                        

                                                            Core URL
                                                            Query Mix
                                                            Recommendation
                                                        

                                                    
                                                    
                                                        

                                                            
                                                                Click "Map Clusters" to analyse topical
                                                                depth.
                                                        

                                                    
                                                

                                            

                                            

                                        

                                    

                                


                                
                                

                                    

                                        Section
                                        4: Improving Low-Quality Content

                                    

                                        

                                            

                                                Identify
                                                    Low-Quality
                                                    Content (Pruning)
                                                
                                            

                                            

                                                

                                                    
                                                        

                                                            URL
                                                            Clicks
                                                            Impr.
                                                            Decision
                                                        

                                                    
                                                    
                                                        

                                                            
                                                                Click "Run Audit" to identify "Zombie"
                                                                pages.

 Platform Updates

                
            

            

                

                    
                    
The Expansion Era (2026)


                    
                    

                        

                            v1.3.0
                            Current
                        

                        

                            

                                
                                     Feature Spotlight: Campaign Intelligence Hub
                                
                                

                                    Introducing the Campaign Auditor—a sophisticated engine designed to
                                    bridge the gap between raw Monday.com task data and strategic campaign oversight. It
                                    transforms fragmented board data into a unified, actionable intelligence dashboard.
                                

                                

                                    
                                        Launch Auditor Tool 
                                    
                                

                            


                            Core Intelligence Capabilities:
                            
    
                                
  • Advanced Mapping Engine: 100% accurate linkage via
                                    [Tech] Board ID, bracketed campaign codes, and domain-based heuristics.
                                
    • 
                                
  • Normalization Logic: Automated cleaning of emojis, URLs, and noise
                                    from master records for robust data integrity.
    • 
                                
  • Urgency Radar: Real-time cross-folder scanning for
                                    Overdue, Due Soon (7 days), and 2-Week task windows.
                                
    • 
                                
  • Manager Dashboard: High-level personnel grouping to track staff
                                    bandwidth and project health at a glance.
    • 
                                
  • Multi-Tier Sorting: Granular control over campaign reporting (Sort
                                    by Name, Urgency, or Task Volume).
    • 
                            

                        

                    


                    
                    

                        

                            v1.2.5
                            April 20, 2026
                        

                        

                            Platform Transparency
                            
    
                                
  • Implemented a premium Changelog modal for easier update tracking.
    • 
                                
  • Added visual notification indicators for new feature releases.
    • 
                                
  • Standardized "Tour" button accessibility across all primary dashboard modules.
    • 
                            

                        

                    


                    
                    

                        

                            v1.2.2
                            April 15, 2026
                        

                        

                            Backlinks Intelligence
                            
    
                                
  • Implemented domain-based indexing for accurate backlink mapping in audit tools.
    • 
                                
  • Optimized centralized mapping engine to replace unreliable string matching.
    • 
                                
  • Synced SeRanking and Monday.com data flows for real-time coverage.
    • 
                            

                        

                    


                    
                    

                        

                            v1.2.0
                            April 2026
                        

                        

                            Onboarding Tour Expansion
                            
    
                                
  • Scaled GA4, Google Ads, SEM, and GSC tours to 10-12 granular steps.
    • 
                                
  • Integrated driver.js (v1.3.1) for high-performance sequential
                                    walkthroughs.
    • 
                                
  • Implemented automatic UI state cleanup hooks to restore dashboard integrity after
                                    tours.
    • 
                            

                        

                    


                    
                    

                        

                            v1.1.2
                            April 14, 2026
                        

                        

                            Dynamic Chatbot Engine
                            
    
                                
  • Launched the flexible filter engine for Monday.com column retrieval.
    • 
                                
  • Implemented multi-select inclusion/exclusion logic for candidate and task filtering.
                                
    • 
                            

                        

                    


                    
                    
The Architecture Era (Early 2026)


                    
                    

                        

                            v1.1.8
                            March 31, 2026
                        

                        

                            FAQ Precision & Strategy
                            
    
                                
  • Enforced a strict "No-Guessing Policy" and Citation Guards for the media chatbot.
                                
    • 
                                
  • Restructured the "Strategy House" section with enhanced visual hierarchy.
    • 
                            

                        

                    


                    
                    

                        

                            v1.1.5
                            March 27, 2026
                        

                        

                            GSC Stability & Performance
                            
    
                                
  • Complete refactor of the Google Search Console module to eliminate syntax
                                    instability.
    • 
                                
  • Introduced granular striking distance win analysis reports.
    • 
                            

                        

                    


                    
                    

                        

                            v1.0.0
                            March 2026
                        

                        

                            The Unified Cockpit
                            
    
                                
  • Initial unification of SEO, SMM, SEM, and GEO tools into a single cockpit
                                    expérience.
    • 
                                
  • Launched keyless "Zero-Key" architecture for secure portal authentication.
    • 
                            

                        

                    


                    
                    
The Legacy Era (2021-2025)


                    

                        

                            v0.9.0
                            Late 2025
                        

                        

                            AI Prototype Launch
                            
    
                                
  • First introduction of AI Content Optimiser and Schema Generator prototypes.
    • 
                            

                        

                    


                    

                        

                            Portfolio
                            Dec 1, 2021
                        

                        

                            Project Genesis
                            
    
                                
  • Initial launch as a professional portfolio and resume site on GitHub Pages.
    •
